items.claim: Conor McGregor is physically diminished five years after his leg injury.
items.quote: Problem is, you're not who you were as a fighter five years later after a leg break. That's not the You're just not the man anymore.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis leaves his neck exposed and exhibits sloppy technique during takedown attempts.
items.quote: When you look at a guy like BSD, he sticks his neck out there. He gets sloppy on takedowns.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has shown a tendency to fight with his chin exposed and becomes fatigued during exchanges.
items.quote: we've also seen him with his chin in the air and sloppy and tired and fatigued when he's in these exchanges.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett's unorthodox style and opportunistic submission skills create a high finishing upside against Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: I think Patty is very awkward and unorthodox and it could be a knee, it could be an uppercut, it could be something that stuns him. And he's so opportunistic with these submissions, bro.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has a history of being dominated on the ground, specifically citing his fight against Moicano.
items.quote: we've seen him dominated on his back against Moano.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis has shown significant defensive vulnerabilities, including being knocked down and finished by Dustin Poirier.
items.quote: You see BSD finish, not only finished by Porier, but guillotine twice, knocked down once, and then KO'ed.
